Okay, so now that my auto responder is set up inside of my auto responder account, now I need to set it here inside of ClickFunnels.
Now the first step, if you haven't already integrated your auto responder, you need to do that first.
You go into my account, click on Settings, and you can click on Email Integrations, and then you can see here's all the accounts I have integrated with my account right now.
I click on New Integration, I pick a nickname for it so I can call it whatever, Aweber, and then you pick the integration type.
If it's Aweber, you click on that, and then I click on Connect Aweber, and it'll go in, it'll create that integration with Aweber.
If you're using some different, again, if you're using iContact, then you click on, I'm sure it's here somewhere.
Let's say you're using Interspire, let's say GetResponse, click on that, and then it'll tell me what you got, put it in my log, in my API key, and GetResponse will give you that, and same thing.
That creates your integration.
Now, as soon as you get that once, that auto responder will always be in your account, and you can go and you can find things really, really quickly.
That's the first step here.
The second step now, you come back to your landing page.
After you've integrated your auto responder, I'm going to reopen it up in the editor, and then here inside of it, now I need to connect my email auto responder to this right here.
I come up here to email, click on that, and I click right here, my integration tools.
I'm going to click, I've got a couple Aweber accounts in here, demo Aweber, and I pick a list, and it takes a little while.
It's only takes about 10, 15 minutes for it to show up, and so I'm not seeing the one I just set up yet.
I'm going to need to come back in 10 minutes, but I'll just create with Venus Factor because that's what I created the other day.
Now it's connected.
Now, anytime somebody comes in here and joins this list, they'll automatically be added to my Aweber form back here.
Now, again, I have it set up for my Venus Factor, so right now if anyone subscribes, they'll be added to this list here.
I'll go back and change that in about 10, 15 minutes after Aweber updates its API, and then I will have it go to the other one.
That's how we set up the email integration.
Go and do that right now inside of your account, and then that's the next step.
See you guys in the next video.
